title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for robotics and physical AI. Cosmos 3 is part of NVIDIA's full physical AI stack that includes the Vera agent CPU layer and Isaac GR00T humanoid robot. The system enables robots to see, plan, and act in the real world.
